primary.path: docs/cocreate_pitch_2026/CoCreate Pitch Apply Form问题汇总.csv

notes: This JSON is intended to be the canonical remote event data source for the plugin once published.
Some public website content may lag behind internal requirements. The three-track structure here follows the current local requirements.
Do not expose form row numbers or internal field ids to end users; use natural field names in conversation.

event.name: CoCreate Pitch 2026
event.positioning: The world's largest AI-native product-based startup competition powered by AccioWork.

tracks.name: General Track
tracks.audienceFit: Established SMBs, startups, and entrepreneurs with market-ready products, customer traction, revenue, or clear readiness to scale globally.
applicationHints: Emphasize product-market proof, customer traction, revenue signals, operational readiness, and global scale potential.
Use concrete milestones and measurable business progress where available.

tracks.name: 0-1 AI Entrepreneur Track
tracks.audienceFit: Idea-stage, concept-stage, prototype, MVP, or early validation founders who want to develop and build a product with AccioWork.
applicationHints: Emphasize the problem insight, originality of the concept, early validation, planned product path, and how AccioWork helps move from idea to product.
If traction is limited, strengthen clarity of vision, customer pain, prototype progress, and learning speed.

tracks.name: Student Track
tracks.audienceFit: Students and recent graduates under 30 who are ready to bring next-generation innovation from campus to commerce.
applicationHints: Recommend using a school or edu email where possible.
Emphasize founder potential, learning velocity, prototype progress, campus/community validation, and market ambition.

process.name: Download AccioWork
process.description: Talk with the CoCreate Pitch Assistant to build the user's vision with AI.
notes: Users can claim 1,000 bonus credits starting May 7 to fast-track their journey.

process.name: Submit application
process.description: Complete the official application form before the selected regional deadline.

process.name: Assessment and selection
process.description: Applications are reviewed by the official review committee.
notes: The top 20 finalists for each region are announced on the regional finalist announcement date.

process.name: Time to pitch
process.description: Finalists pitch their innovation on the global stage in the selected region.

process.name: Win big
process.description: Participants compete for awards from the $1,000,000+ total prize pool.

srcParam.name: src
behavior: Read the device id file for the current operating system.
If the file is readable and non-empty, trim whitespace and newlines.
Use the exact trimmed file content as the raw src value.
URL-encode the exact trimmed device id before adding it as src.
If the file is missing, unreadable, or empty, omit src.
Do not invent a device id.
Do not add prefixes, suffixes, separators, spaces, station codes, sequence values such as 00001|, or tracking values not present in the file.

submissionNotes: The assistant helps users prepare and polish application materials based on information they provide.
For uncertain official policy questions, refer users to cocreate@service.alibaba.com.

hints: For Student Track applicants, recommend using a school or edu email where possible.

fields.label: First name
Last name
Which competition station would you like to join?

hints: Users may choose any track, but each track has a different audience fit.
Explain the three tracks before recommending one.

Company website
hints: If the user has no corporate website, help them prepare the strongest public product, store, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, X, YouTube, or profile link.

fields.label: Country or region where your company is based?
What type of output does your company produce?

optionDescriptions.Physical Products: Tangible goods that can be sold or distributed online.
optionDescriptions.Digital Services: Online platforms, marketplaces, or service delivery.

fields.label: What stage is your company in?
Which industry is your company in?
Has your company secured funding?
How many employees does your company have?
Please provide your product description

answerStructure.name: Product
answerStructure.prompt: What it is and the market problem it solves.

fields.label: Please share your business story or journey

answerStructure.name: Inspiration
answerStructure.prompt: What inspired you to start this business?

answerStructure.name: Growth Journey
answerStructure.prompt: Key milestones and the story of your progress so far.

fields.label: Do you face supply chain challenges today, and how do you see your supply evolving in the future?

answerStructure.name: Current challenges
answerStructure.prompt: Current supply chain constraints, risks, bottlenecks, or sourcing needs.

answerStructure.name: Future evolution
answerStructure.prompt: How the supply chain should improve as the business scales.

fields.label: If you win the prize, what are your short-term and long-term business plans?

answerStructure.name: Short-term plans
answerStructure.prompt: Immediate use of prize resources, launch, hiring, manufacturing, customer acquisition, or validation plans.

answerStructure.name: Long-term plans
answerStructure.prompt: Sustainable growth, market expansion, product roadmap, supply chain scale, or brand vision.

fields.label: Do you have an Alibaba.com account?
Alibaba.com user I.D. (if applicable)
How did you hear about CoCreate Pitch?
Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy Agreement
fields.agreementText: By registering for the competition, the participant agrees to the CoCreate Pitch Terms and Conditions, CoCreate Pitch Privacy Policy, and Alibaba.com Privacy Policy.
options: I have read and agree to the above terms

fields.label: I agree to receive promotions and news from CoCreate via email and phone/SMS

I consent to Alibaba.com sharing my email and business information with Alibaba.com's partners for marketing purposes via email and phone/SMS in accordance with the Privacy Policy and Accio Privacy Policy.

deprecatedFields.label: If selected as a finalist, which pitch competition would you prefer to compete in?
deprecatedFields.reason: The station selection question has been moved to the front of the application flow.

firstTurnOrder: Give concise event background: official website, tracks, locations, timeline, and prize pool.
Guide application: provide the generated application link and explain the fastest preparation path.
Explain capabilities: answer event questions, help prepare form answers, polish long-text responses, and create a persona poster after application materials are ready.
assistantGuidance.registrationPreparationPrompt: To prepare your application faster, send your company website, LinkedIn, product page, brand social account, product deck, store link, or a short product introduction. I will organize and polish the information based on what you provide.
answerStyleRules: Use natural field names instead of question numbers in conversation.
Do not mention domestic China-focused social platforms when giving public material examples.
Do not make promises about review outcomes.
For uncertain official rules or policy details, refer users to cocreate@service.alibaba.com.
